title: Everything You Need to Know About NYC’s Automated Employment Decision Tools (AEDT) Law
summary:
NYC's new 2023 regulations on Automated Employment Decision Tools (AEDTs) could impact you, whether you're a software vendor, employer, HR professional, or job seeker. Dive into our article to understand this law, recognize violations, and ensure your hiring processes are compliant.

Artykuł Everything You Need to Know About NYC’s Automated Employment Decision Tools (AEDT) Law pochodzi z serwisu DLabs.AI.
author: Katarzyna Rojewska
